name: PVE-Vitals
description: Always-on, read-only Proxmox VE status wall. Green means fine, red means go look. One-page dashboard tuned for a kiosk monitor: live node health (CPU, RAM, disk, uptime), guest overview with per-guest load bars, storage, recent task feed, and an aggregate health banner. HA, Ceph, replication, and backup awareness. Prometheus /metrics endpoint. Bilingual (en/de).

notes.text: Read-only by design: no control endpoints exist. Create a PVE API token first (Datacenter > Permissions > API Tokens > Add) and grant the token user role PVEAuditor on /.
After install, edit /opt/pve-vitals/.env with PVE_HOST, PVE_TOKEN_ID, and PVE_SECRET, then run: systemctl restart pve-vitals
